title: rosa tomentosa var. genuina
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. genuina, also known as the woolly rose, is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae and is native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa var. genuina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Rosa tomentosa var. genuina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
